Appearances:
Plaintiff Remberto Sainez is present.

Defendant Ana Lazo is present.

The Judge Pro Tem Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Oct. 07, 2013 remains on calendar.(D501/JPT)
